name: dondozo
flavor_texts: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey.
It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart.
text: Dondozo is the Big Catfish Pokémon. It is a water-type Pokémon. Abilities: unaware, oblivious, water-veil (hidden). Base stats — HP: 150, Attack: 100, Defense: 115, Sp. Atk: 65, Sp. Def: 65, Speed: 35. Evolution line: dondozo. Lore: This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey. It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart.
